$comment: Index of core peripheral SCVD files and conditions when to use them.
title: Core Peripherals index
description: Index listing core peripheral SCVD description files and CPU type/feature conditions under which each file is active.

CorePeripherals.description: Array of core peripheral entries (SCVD files with optional activation conditions).

CorePeripheralEntry.description: Single SCVD description entry with optional CPU type and CPU feature conditions.

ScvdFileType.description: Path or identifier of the SCVD description file.

CpuType.description: Specifies one or more CPU types. '*' is allowed as wildcard and is the default if omitted.

CpuFeatures.description: Map of CPU features and their value. Each feature key may only appear once. '*' is allowed as wildcard and is the default if omitted.
